{{Quote|We have more ion cannons than that ship has guns, Lieutenant Gorev. I want it, and you'll give it to me.|Captain Joak Drysso|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
'''[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Gorev''' was the gunnery officer of the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' during the [[Bacta War]].

==Biography==
A thickset man, he was not afraid to question the orders given by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Joak Drysso]] during the [[Battle of Thyferra]], but Drysso overruled him, and threatened to replace him at his post if he continued to challenge his command.

{{Char-stub}}
